hero.title: Building Brands One Post at a Time.
hero.subtitle: From content planning to performance tracking, I create social media strategies that boost engagement, visibility, and real business growth.

about.name: Rahul
about.describtion: a Social Media Executive specializing in Instagram, LinkedIn, and performance-based content strategies. I help startups and businesses transform their online presence into measurable growth

experience.describtion: Platforms: Instagram, LinkedIn, Facebook, YouTube Shorts

workProcess.top_Description: Every brand is different — so I follow a structured yet flexible workflow that turns ideas into measurable growth. From research to reporting, every step is built around strategy, creativity, and performance.
workProcess.bottom_Description: Social media success isn’t about posting more — it’s about posting smarter. I combine creative storytelling with analytics to build brands that people trust and engage with.

ctaCard.name: Rahul
ctaCard.description: a Social Media Executive specializing in Instagram, LinkedIn, and performance-based content strategies. I help startups and businesses transform their online presence into measurable growth
ctaCard.tagLine: Let’s Turn Your Social Media Into a Growth Engine.
ctaCard.subTagLine: Strategy. Creativity. Analytics. Everything your brand needs to stand out in today’s fast-moving digital world.

myServices.description: From content strategy to paid campaigns, I offer a range of services designed to help your brand thrive on social media. Whether you’re looking to boost engagement, grow your audience, or drive real business results, I have the expertise and tools to make it happen.

services.name: Content Strategy
services.description: Tailored social media strategies that align with your brand goals and audience.

services.name: Analytics & Reporting
services.description: In-depth performance tracking and insights to optimize your social media efforts.

services.name: Paid Campaigns
services.description: Strategic planning and execution of paid social media campaigns for maximum ROI.

services.name: Brand Positioning
services.description: Crafting a unique and compelling brand voice that resonates with your target audience.

testimonials.name: Ankita Joshi

testimonials.desciption: “Our Instagram growth doubled within 2 months. The strategy and consistency were amazing.”

testimonials.desciption: “Professional, creative, and data-driven. Our engagement rate went from 2% to 8%.”
